title: Legacy Rocket Model
description: This mod replaced the model of tier 2 rocket of Galacticraft to it's old model.
body:
# Legacy Rocket Model

This mod replaced the model of tier 2 rocket of [Galacticraft-Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/galacticraft-legacy) to it's old model.

## Versions

This mod requires **Minecraft Forge 1.12.2 14.23.5.2859** or above and **Galacticraft 4.0.6** or above.

_Because this mod's function is too simple, there won't be any updates in the future._

## Showcase

![Before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1626b55ea8071b1b1280634f7800ba3043425dd.png)
![After](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/492a407f93566c438173331d3c179f8672a5a1df.png)
